news.title:

Stock exhibits higher highs and lows with bullish price action, signaling uptrend continuation.

news.title:
Rajesh Palviya of Axis Securities recommends Hindalco, Cummins India, and Adani Power as buys for April 10, highlighting bullish trends.
Hindalco targets ₹1,030, Cummins India ₹5,350, and Adani Power ₹190, with strong support levels and technical indicators backing the outlook.
news.summary:

news.title:
Cummins India to hold board meeting on May 27, 2026, to approve audited results for FY26 and recommend final dividend.
Trading window remains closed until May 29, 2026, per insider trading regulations; update posted on company website.
news.summary:

news.title:

Sector resilient despite geopolitical tensions; strong order books, growth trends drive optimism.

news.title:
Analysts recommend Adani Power, Titan, Cummins India, Mankind Pharma, and Arvind Ltd. based on technical patterns and sectoral momentum.
Targets include Adani Power at Rs 170, Titan at Rs 4,180, Cummins India at Rs 4,820, Mankind Pharma at Rs 2,250, and Arvind Ltd. at Rs 430.

Company to appeal; penalties unlikely to impact finances or operations.
